title: [MM] Modern Mayhem
description: Adds multiple military armors and accessories.
body:
Modern Mayhem is a mod focused on adding realistic and authentic military equipment while keeping a perfect stylization balance between Vanilla Minecraft and popular military mods, namely TacZ (make this a link), which also received full compatibility with the mod.

Included are different equipment pieces, such as body armors, backpacks, NVGs and much more.

Every piece of equipment has many variants which are all entirely configurable, allowing you to alter aspects such as armor points, backpack storage capacity and other parameters.

The main attraction of the mod is the extremely realistic night-vision system featuring authentic visuals, auto-gain functionality, first person animations and even COTI (Clip-On-Thermal-Imagers).

Join our [official Discord](https://discord.gg/Vxt4UBDnPj) to view sneak peeks, submit suggestions, report bugs, and test out unreleased beta features!

This mod itself is free to use in modpacks and media content with proper credit. The mod's artistic assets (textures, models, animations) are proprietary to the development team, with all rights reserved. The development team has not authorized any other projects (especially any Bedrock version of this mod) to use the artistic assets of this mod. Any appearance of our mod's artistic assets in other projects constitutes illegal misappropriation. The development team strongly condemns any acts of infringement or theft and urges the responsible parties to immediately cease such infringing activities.

Credits: Foky (Co-Founder, Main Artist), TKG112 (Co-Founder, Main Developer), CookieG (Developer)

Contributors | Special Thanks: Maxinablender (Artistic Assets), zenzen (Animations), OddlyDelta (Animations), bsmonster_ (Artistic Assets)
